title: How to verify SSO callback configuration
body_markdown: Validate redirect URI, cookie domain, and nonce replay handling for auth callbacks.

title: Steps to debug JWT clock skew issues
body_markdown: Check NTP sync on auth nodes and allow bounded token skew tolerance.

title: Auth session TTL troubleshooting guide
body_markdown: Confirm session ttl settings across gateway and identity service are aligned.

title: How to test Stripe webhook idempotency
body_markdown: Replay the same webhook event id and verify only one billing mutation occurs.

title: Billing plan state mismatch runbook
body_markdown: Reconcile plan transition history against invoice finalization and entitlement tables.

title: Invoice rendering timeout mitigation steps
body_markdown: Profile worker latency, increase bounded timeout, and scale renderer pool.

title: How do I improve Ask Echo evidence quality
body_markdown: Ensure query normalization and include known entity aliases before retrieval.

title: Special character query handling checklist
body_markdown: Escape reserved symbols and preserve intended token boundaries in parser.

title: Deterministic ranking tie-break setup
body_markdown: Sort by score, recency, and stable key to avoid non-deterministic ordering.

title: Embedding fallback performance triage
body_markdown: Measure cache hit ratio and worker queue depth when fallback path is active.

title: Stale embedding index recovery steps
body_markdown: Rebuild vectors for affected tickets and invalidate stale nearest-neighbor cache.

title: How to validate vector dimension compatibility
body_markdown: Confirm query and corpus embedding dimensions match before similarity scoring.

title: Vite proxy routing troubleshooting
body_markdown: Verify dev proxy target and base path to avoid routing API requests to wrong host.

title: CORS preflight failures debugging steps
body_markdown: Compare origin/credentials headers between browser request and backend response.

title: Import casing errors in Linux containers
body_markdown: Normalize file imports to exact case; case-insensitive local FS can hide issues.

title: Integration schema mapping quickstart
body_markdown: Map upstream required fields to internal schema with explicit optional handling.

title: Preserving source_id during connector retries
body_markdown: Carry forward immutable source_id in retry envelope and persistence layer.

title: Placeholder integration contract checklist
body_markdown: Define minimal contract for id, title, body, tags, updated timestamp and source url.

title: How to set up auth incident escalation
body_markdown: Route Sev1 auth incidents to identity on-call and include token logs plus tenant context.

title: Billing incident verification template
body_markdown: After fix, re-run invoice generation and verify plan entitlement matches expected state.

title: Search regression checks after ranking change
body_markdown: Run top query set and compare hit@3 against last known-good baseline.

title: Embedding cache invalidation best practices
body_markdown: Invalidate cache on model version change and keep TTL bounded for hot keys.

title: Frontend basepath deployment checklist
body_markdown: Ensure router base path, vite config, and reverse proxy rewrite rules align.

title: Integration retry safety notes
body_markdown: Retries must be idempotent and preserve original payload metadata for auditing.

title: How do I collect auth repro evidence
body_markdown: Ask for request id, redirect chain, browser version, and exact callback URL.

title: Billing webhook dead-letter triage
body_markdown: Inspect DLQ events and replay in order after idempotency checks.

title: Ask Echo how-to query routing notes
body_markdown: Route instructional queries to KB-heavy retrieval path before ticket-only fallback.

title: Embedding warmup script usage
body_markdown: Run warmup on top 100 frequent queries after restart to reduce p95 latency.

title: Frontend auth redirect loop mitigation
body_markdown: Preserve return URL and clear stale auth cookie before callback retry.

title: Integration source URL traceability
body_markdown: Store source URL for every imported artifact to speed incident triage.
